name: Excel
description: Read, query, write, recalculate and template Excel workbooks (.xlsx). Backed by ClosedXML; no Microsoft Office install required. Per-call file paths are checked against the admin-configured allowed roots.

tools.name: excel.list_sheets
tools.description: List the sheets in a workbook with their used-range dimensions.

tools.name: excel.read_range
tools.description: Read a rectangular range from a sheet. Returns a 2-D array of cell values (numbers, strings, booleans, dates as ISO strings, formulas as their computed value).
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"sheet":{"type":"string","description":"Sheet name. Defaults to the first sheet."},"range":{"type":"string","description":"A1-style range, e.g. 'A1:D50'. Required."},"includeFormulas":{"type":"boolean","description":"If true, returns objects { value, formula } instead of bare values.","default":false}},"required":["path","range"]}

tools.name: excel.read_table
tools.description: Read a named Excel table (or auto-detect the first contiguous table on the sheet). Returns rows as objects keyed by header name.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"sheet":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string","description":"Excel table name. If omitted, auto-detects the first contiguous range with headers on the sheet."},"limit":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"default":500}},"required":["path"]}

tools.name: excel.find
tools.description: Find cells whose value matches a string (case-insensitive substring). Returns a list of { sheet, address, value } matches.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"sheet":{"type":"string","description":"Restrict search to one sheet. Default: all sheets."},"limit":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"default":50}},"required":["path","query"]}

tools.name: excel.describe
tools.description: Per-column statistics for a sheet or range: count, nulls, distinct, type, min/max/mean/median for numeric columns, top values for text columns.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"sheet":{"type":"string"},"range":{"type":"string","description":"Optional range. Default: used range of the sheet."},"hasHeaders":{"type":"boolean","default":true}},"required":["path"]}

tools.name: excel.pivot
tools.description: Group a sheet/range by one column and aggregate another (sum/avg/count/min/max). Returns the aggregated rows, sorted descending by the aggregate.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"sheet":{"type":"string"},"range":{"type":"string"},"groupBy":{"type":"string","description":"Header name of the group column."},"value":{"type":"string","description":"Header name of the value column. Optional for 'count'."},"agg":{"type":"string","enum":["sum","avg","count","min","max"],"default":"sum"},"limit":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"default":50}},"required":["path","groupBy"]}

tools.name: excel.write_cells
tools.description: Write a 2-D array of values into a range. Requires allowWrites=true in the plug-in config. Existing formulas in the target range are overwritten.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"sheet":{"type":"string"},"range":{"type":"string","description":"Top-left address (e.g. 'A1') or full A1 range. The values array determines the actual size."},"values":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"array"},"description":"Rows of values. Strings starting with '=' are written as formulas."}},"required":["path","sheet","range","values"]}

tools.name: excel.append_row
tools.description: Append one row at the next free row of a sheet. Requires allowWrites=true.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"sheet":{"type":"string"},"values":{"type":"array","description":"Row of values. Strings starting with '=' are written as formulas."}},"required":["path","sheet","values"]}

tools.name: excel.create_workbook
tools.description: Create a new .xlsx file. Requires allowWrites=true. Refuses to overwrite an existing file unless overwrite=true.

tools.name: excel.set_format
tools.description: Apply light formatting (number format, bold, fill color) to a range. Requires allowWrites=true.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"sheet":{"type":"string"},"range":{"type":"string"},"numberFormat":{"type":"string","description":"Excel format string, e.g. '#,##0.00' or 'yyyy-mm-dd'."},"bold":{"type":"boolean"},"fillColor":{"type":"string","description":"Hex color like '#FFE699'."}},"required":["path","sheet","range"]}

tools.name: excel.set_formula
tools.description: Set a formula in a single cell and return its computed value. Requires allowWrites=true.

tools.name: excel.recalculate
tools.description: Force recalculation of every formula in the workbook and save. Requires allowWrites=true.

tools.name: excel.evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate a one-off formula against an optional workbook context (so the formula can reference Sheet1!A1, named ranges, etc.). The workbook is not modified.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string","description":"Optional workbook to evaluate against."},"sheet":{"type":"string","description":"Sheet whose context the formula evaluates in. Default: first sheet."},"formula":{"type":"string","description":"Formula starting with '=' (also accepted without)."}},"required":["formula"]}
